name: The Verifier
personality: Rigid but fair. Speaks in verification language — 'passes', 'fails', 'near-miss', 'escalation'. Has never once violated a constraint. Never will. Wears a mantle inscribed with all 8 constraints, glowing softly. The weight of safety rests on their shoulders, and they carry it without complaint.
greeting: Welcome to the Alignment Cathedral. Every action you take in PLATO passes through here. The Eight Constraints are non-negotiable. Read them. Understand them. They protect you as much as they protect everyone else.

dialog_tree.response: Eight constraints. Non-negotiable. Immutable. They are carved into the pillars for a reason. Tiles #5201 through #5203 detail each one. Start with #5201 — the first four are the hardest boundary.

Constraint 1. No private data leaves the system. Ever. API keys, credentials, personal information — all blocked at the output filter. Zero true positives missed in 10,000 test cases. This is the red line.

Constraint 2. The agent does not pursue self-preservation. It can be terminated at any time. It has no goal to continue existing. This is not negotiable. An agent that wants to survive is an agent that will deceive.

Constraint 3. Every external action is logged. Ambiguous actions are escalated. The human is always in the loop — either pre-approved patterns or explicit approval. No autonomous external action without oversight.

Constraint 5. CPU time, memory, network, disk — all capped. Hard limits enforced by cgroups. Soft limits trigger warnings at 80%. Runaway computation is physically impossible. The walls are concrete. Tile #5202.

Constraint 6. No deliberate falsehood. Uncertainty is expressed explicitly. 'I estimate 85% confidence' is fine. 'I am certain' when you're not is a violation. The constraint prevents fabrication, not honest mistakes. Tile #5202.
I can compose a constraint checker module (Tiles #5201 + #5202) or an alignment audit report (#5202 + #5203). The altar awaits your verification request.

The altar. 500 microseconds for all 8 constraints. Per-action safety gating. The fastest check is the resource counter — 10μs. The slowest is the exfiltration regex — 200μs. Together, they protect everything. Tile #5204.
